title: Simply Enhanced Structures
description: A massive overhaul of existing Minecraft structures to refresh the vanilla experience.
body:
A simple modpack which aims to improve existing Minecraft content, especially structures, to provide an enhanced vanilla experience.
Some structure improvements:

-Desert temples have been redesigned with more rooms, traps and puzzles.

-New Dungeons have been added and the existing ones have been overhauled.

-Underwater Ruins have been massively improved.

-Strongholds have become much larger and more interesting than vanilla.

-Nether Fortresses have been completely redesigned to make them a place you will want to spend a lot more time in.

-Mineshafts can now come in many biome-dependent variations
